top.thesis: PROTHENA CORP PUBLIC LTD CO (PRTA) screens constructively, with 8 independent categories pointing favourably — led by growth, historical analogs, financial health. The weighted composite score is 73/100, and 8 of the scored categories agree on the bullish side versus 1 on the bearish side — conviction here rests on that breadth of agreement, not on any single category. The main offsetting concern is price technicals (score 30/100). This is a research/screening read of independent evidence, not a prediction or investment advice.

top.technical_summary: Category scores — price technicals 30/100 (confidence 100%), momentum 43/100 (confidence 80%). Latest close 8.67 on 2026-07-20; the available 500-bar window ranged 4.32–25.42. The last close sits at the 21% point of that range (0% = window low, 100% = window high).
top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 8 agree on the bullish side (8 bullish, 1 bearish); signal-agreement is 44% and overall conviction confidence is 44%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 83% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $51.1M, net income $32.7M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 50.5%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a buy by SCULLY WILLIAM P on 2026-06-16; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 25.42 (the 500-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 8.67.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 4.32 (the 500-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: regulatory approval: 0.23' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 7 agree on the bullish side (7 bullish, 0 bearish); signal-agreement is 64% and overall conviction confidence is 61%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 79% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (ownership / insider activity); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $179.1M, net income $169.7M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 94.4%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a award by Nguyen Tuan on 2026-02-02; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 5.38 (the 500-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 4.41.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 2.71 (the 500-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: index inclusion: 0.22' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

top.technical_summary: Category scores — price technicals 63/100 (confidence 100%), momentum 87/100 (confidence 80%). Latest close 15.01 on 2026-07-20; the available 500-bar window ranged 7.73–17.56. The last close sits at the 74% point of that range (0% = window low, 100% = window high).
top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 6 agree on the bullish side (6 bullish, 0 bearish); signal-agreement is 68% and overall conviction confidence is 65%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 83% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (ownership / insider activity); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q2 2026: revenue $178.4M, net income $16.2M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 12.1%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a other:F by Tengwall Kyle on 2026-06-15; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 17.56 (the 500-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 15.01.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 7.73 (the 500-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: earnings beat: 0.22' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

top.technical_summary: Category scores — price technicals 83/100 (confidence 100%), momentum 88/100 (confidence 80%). Latest close 29.59 on 2026-07-20; the available 500-bar window ranged 16.00–30.84. The last close sits at the 92% point of that range (0% = window low, 100% = window high).
top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 8 agree on the bullish side (8 bullish, 1 bearish); signal-agreement is 54% and overall conviction confidence is 53%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 86% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $30.1M, net income $10.7M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 1930.4%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a buy by LEE SANG YOUNG on 2026-03-06; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 30.84 (the 500-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 29.59.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 16.00 (the 500-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: insider buying: 0.23' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

all_ranked.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 6 agree on the bullish side (6 bullish, 2 bearish); signal-agreement is 32% and overall conviction confidence is 33%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 61% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (competitive position, growth, historical analogs); more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $0, net income $-4.0M).
Operating-margin trend: begin tracking once margin data is reported (not currently available).
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a buy by Bitterman Robert J on 2026-06-26; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 9.79 (the 500-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 1.08.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 0.81 (the 500-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: insider buying: 0.14' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.
